hero.title: Build on Solana.
hero.subtitle: Learn by doing.
hero.description: Free, gamified Solana developer education for LATAM. Earn XP, collect on-chain credentials, and join the fastest-growing blockchain ecosystem.
Learn Solana by shipping real projects. Enroll with your wallet, earn Token-2022 XP, track level progression, and unlock soulbound credentials that prove your progress on-chain.

panel.description: Wallet-signed enrollment. Token-2022 XP. Soulbound credential.

floating.credentialDesc: Metaplex Core NFT, verifiable on Solana.
floating.xpDesc: XP balance updates from your Token-2022 account.

howItWorks.description: Enroll with your wallet, complete lessons and challenges, and turn progress into verifiable proof.

one.title: Connect and enroll
one.desc: Connect your wallet and sign enrollment directly on Devnet.

two.title: Earn on-chain XP
two.desc: XP is read from your Token-2022 account and converted into levels.

three.title: Verify credentials
three.desc: Unlock and verify soulbound Metaplex Core credentials by track.

projectFirst.title: Project-first curriculum
projectFirst.desc: Learn by building practical Solana products, not passive tutorials.

xpProgression.title: Token-2022 XP progression
xpProgression.desc: Your XP is a non-transferable Token-2022 balance tied to your wallet.

soulbound.title: Soulbound credentials
soulbound.desc: Track-level credentials are verifiable and upgrade in-place on-chain.

tracks.description: Built for developers, researchers, creators, and operators who want measurable Web3 progress.

founders.title: Founders
founders.desc: From idea to launch: strategy, team, execution.

curriculum.title: Structured curriculum
curriculum.desc: Clear learning paths from fundamentals to advanced specializations.

xpLevels.title: On-chain XP + levels
xpLevels.desc: Level is derived from XP with transparent progression mechanics.

challenges.title: Challenge-driven learning
challenges.desc: Interactive lessons and coding challenges reinforce mastery.

verification.title: Credential verification
verification.desc: Inspect wallet-owned credentials and verify on explorer.

community.title: Community-ready model
community.desc: Designed for cohorts, communities, and open-source collaboration.

latam.title: LATAM-first accessibility
latam.desc: Prepared for PT-BR, ES, and EN learning experiences.

finalCta.badge: Free to start. Built for real Solana builders.
finalCta.description: Start with one track, prove skills on-chain, and build a developer profile that compounds.

footer.description: Solana-native learning for builders. Ship projects, earn XP, and unlock verifiable credentials.
footer.securityText: Wallet-first auth, on-chain credentials, and transparent progress.

profilePage.connectWalletDesc: Link a Solana wallet to receive on-chain credentials when you complete courses
profilePage.credentialsPlaceholder: Complete courses to receive soulbound NFT credentials
profilePage.noCredentialsDesc: Complete courses to earn soulbound NFT credentials on Solana
profilePage.privateProfileDesc: has set their profile to private.

dashboard.pickCoursePrompt: Pick a course and start building on Solana
dashboard.completeLessonsToClimb: Complete lessons to climb the global leaderboard
